key.name: date-enabled
key.description: Shows the date widget on the desktop.

key.name: date-theme-mode
key.description: 0 = Dark, 1 = Light, 2 = Follow system color-scheme.

key.name: date-use-system-accent
key.description: Uses the GNOME accent color instead of the default red highlight.

key.name: date-accent-color
key.description: -1 = custom, 0..17 = built-in palette colors.

key.name: date-custom-accent-color
key.description: Custom #rrggbb accent color used when date-accent-color is -1.

key.name: date-opacity
key.description: Opacity percentage for the date widget.

key.name: widget-x
key.description: Horizontal pixel position for the date widget.

key.name: widget-y
key.description: Vertical pixel position for the date widget.

key.name: widget-width
key.description: Width in pixels for the date widget.

key.name: widget-height
key.description: Height in pixels for the date widget.

key.name: clock-x
key.description: Horizontal pixel position for the digital clock widget.

key.name: clock-enabled
key.description: Shows the digital clock widget on the desktop.

key.name: clock-theme-mode
key.description: 0 = Dark, 1 = Light, 2 = Follow system color-scheme.

key.name: clock-use-system-accent
key.summary: Digital clock widget uses system accent
key.description: Uses the GNOME accent color instead of the default red highlight.

key.name: clock-accent-color
key.description: -1 = custom, 0..17 = built-in palette colors.

key.name: clock-custom-accent-color
key.summary: Digital clock widget custom accent color
key.description: Custom #rrggbb accent color used when clock-accent-color is -1.

key.name: clock-opacity
key.description: Opacity percentage for the digital clock widget.

key.name: clock-y
key.description: Vertical pixel position for the digital clock widget.

key.name: clock-width
key.description: Width in pixels for the digital clock widget.

key.name: clock-height
key.description: Height in pixels for the digital clock widget.

key.name: clock-use-24-hour
key.description: Uses 24-hour time for the digital clock widget.

key.name: clock-widget-variant
key.description: 0 = Digital clock, 1 = World clock.

key.name: world-clock-time-zone
key.description: IANA time zone identifier for the world clock variant.

key.name: world-clock-city-name
key.description: Display city name for the world clock variant.

key.name: large-clock-x
key.description: Horizontal pixel position for the large digital clock widget.

key.name: large-clock-enabled
key.description: Shows the large digital clock widget on the desktop.

key.name: large-clock-theme-mode
key.summary: Large digital clock widget theme mode
key.description: 0 = Dark, 1 = Light, 2 = Follow system color-scheme.

key.name: large-clock-use-system-accent
key.summary: Large digital clock widget uses system accent
key.description: Uses the GNOME accent color instead of the default red highlight.

key.name: large-clock-accent-color
key.summary: Large digital clock widget accent color
key.description: -1 = custom, 0..17 = built-in palette colors.

key.name: large-clock-custom-accent-color
key.summary: Large digital clock widget custom accent color
key.description: Custom #rrggbb accent color used when large-clock-accent-color is -1.

key.name: large-clock-opacity
key.description: Opacity percentage for the large digital clock widget.

key.name: large-clock-y
key.description: Vertical pixel position for the large digital clock widget.

key.name: large-clock-width
key.description: Width in pixels for the large digital clock widget.

key.name: large-clock-height
key.description: Height in pixels for the large digital clock widget.

key.name: large-clock-show-date
key.summary: Show date on large digital clock
key.description: Shows the date above the time on the large digital clock widget.

key.name: analog-clock-x
key.description: Horizontal pixel position for the analog clock widget.

key.name: analog-clock-enabled
key.description: Shows the analog clock widget on the desktop.

key.name: analog-clock-theme-mode
key.description: 0 = Dark, 1 = Light, 2 = Follow system color-scheme.

key.name: analog-clock-use-system-accent
key.summary: Analog clock widget uses system accent
key.description: Uses the GNOME accent color instead of the default red highlight.

key.name: analog-clock-accent-color
key.description: -1 = custom, 0..17 = built-in palette colors.

key.name: analog-clock-custom-accent-color
key.summary: Analog clock widget custom accent color
key.description: Custom #rrggbb accent color used when analog-clock-accent-color is -1.

key.name: analog-clock-opacity
key.description: Opacity percentage for the analog clock widget.

key.name: analog-clock-y
key.description: Vertical pixel position for the analog clock widget.

key.name: analog-clock-width
key.description: Width in pixels for the analog clock widget.

key.name: analog-clock-height
key.description: Height in pixels for the analog clock widget.

key.name: analog-clock-style
key.description: 0 = Swiss railway, 1 = Minimalist.

key.name: photo-x
key.description: Horizontal pixel position for the photo widget.

key.name: photo-enabled
key.description: Shows the photo widget on the desktop.

key.name: photo-theme-mode
key.description: 0 = Dark, 1 = Light, 2 = Follow system color-scheme.

key.name: photo-use-system-accent
key.description: Uses the GNOME accent color instead of the default red highlight.

key.name: photo-accent-color
key.description: -1 = custom, 0..17 = built-in palette colors.

key.name: photo-custom-accent-color
key.description: Custom #rrggbb accent color used when photo-accent-color is -1.

key.name: photo-opacity
key.description: Opacity percentage for the photo widget.

key.name: photo-y
key.description: Vertical pixel position for the photo widget.

key.name: photo-width
key.description: Width in pixels for the photo widget.

key.name: photo-height
key.description: Height in pixels for the photo widget.

key.name: photo-image-path
key.description: Absolute, file URI, or extension-relative path to the image shown in the photo widget.

key.name: photo-border-enabled
key.description: Adds a frame around the photo.

key.name: photo-border-size
key.description: Frame thickness in pixels for the photo widget.

key.name: photo-pill-shape-enabled
key.description: Uses circle or pill rounding for the photo widget.

key.name: photo-image-fill-mode
key.description: 0 = Crop, 1 = Fit, 2 = Stretch.

key.name: photo-grayscale-enabled
key.description: Desaturates the photo image.

key.name: weather-x
key.description: Horizontal pixel position for the weather widget.

key.name: weather-enabled
key.description: Shows the weather widget on the desktop.

key.name: weather-theme-mode
key.description: 0 = Dark, 1 = Light, 2 = Follow system color-scheme.

key.name: weather-use-system-accent
key.description: Uses the GNOME accent color instead of the default red highlight.

key.name: weather-accent-color
key.description: -1 = custom, 0..17 = built-in palette colors.

key.name: weather-custom-accent-color
key.description: Custom #rrggbb accent color used when weather-accent-color is -1.

key.name: weather-opacity
key.description: Opacity percentage for the weather widget.

key.name: weather-y
key.description: Vertical pixel position for the weather widget.

key.name: weather-width
key.description: Width in pixels for the weather widget.

key.name: weather-height
key.description: Height in pixels for the weather widget.

key.name: weather-location
key.description: Legacy free-form location query kept for compatibility with older extension versions.

key.name: weather-location-name
key.description: Display name selected from Open-Meteo geocoding.

key.name: weather-latitude
key.description: Latitude selected from Open-Meteo geocoding.

key.name: weather-longitude
key.description: Longitude selected from Open-Meteo geocoding.

key.name: weather-time-zone
key.description: IANA time zone returned by Open-Meteo geocoding for the selected weather location.

key.name: weather-temperature-unit
key.description: 0 = Celsius, 1 = Fahrenheit.

key.name: media-x
key.description: Horizontal pixel position for the media widget.

key.name: media-enabled
key.description: Shows the media widget on the desktop.

key.name: media-theme-mode
key.description: 0 = Dark, 1 = Light, 2 = Follow system color-scheme.

key.name: media-use-system-accent
key.description: Uses the GNOME accent color instead of the default red highlight.

key.name: media-accent-color
key.description: -1 = custom, 0..17 = built-in palette colors.

key.name: media-custom-accent-color
key.description: Custom #rrggbb accent color used when media-accent-color is -1.

key.name: media-opacity
key.description: Opacity percentage for the media widget.

key.name: media-y
key.description: Vertical pixel position for the media widget.

key.name: media-width
key.description: Width in pixels for the media widget.

key.name: media-height
key.description: Height in pixels for the media widget.

key.name: system-x
key.description: Horizontal pixel position for the system monitor widget.

key.name: system-enabled
key.description: Shows the system monitor widget on the desktop.

key.name: system-theme-mode
key.description: 0 = Dark, 1 = Light, 2 = Follow system color-scheme.

key.name: system-use-system-accent
key.summary: System monitor widget uses system accent
key.description: Uses the GNOME accent color instead of the default red highlight.

key.name: system-accent-color
key.description: -1 = custom, 0..17 = built-in palette colors.

key.name: system-custom-accent-color
key.summary: System monitor widget custom accent color
key.description: Custom #rrggbb accent color used when system-accent-color is -1.

key.name: system-opacity
key.description: Opacity percentage for the system monitor widget.

key.name: system-y
key.description: Vertical pixel position for the system monitor widget.

key.name: system-width
key.description: Width in pixels for the system monitor widget.

key.name: system-height
key.description: Height in pixels for the system monitor widget.

key.name: system-monitor-style
key.description: 0 = number list, 1 = hollow chart grid.

key.name: theme-mode
key.description: 0 = Dark, 1 = Light, 2 = Follow system color-scheme.

key.name: use-system-accent
key.description: Uses the GNOME accent color instead of the default red highlights.

key.name: accent-color
key.description: -1 = custom, 0..17 = built-in palette colors.

key.name: custom-accent-color
key.description: Custom #rrggbb accent color used when accent-color is -1.
